# E2E Instructions

Route E2E work through [../../docs/testing/TESTING.md](../../docs/testing/TESTING.md), [../../docs/development/GETTING_STARTED.md](../../docs/development/GETTING_STARTED.md), and [../../docs/validation/README.md](../../docs/validation/README.md).

Prefer focused reproduction and isolated reruns before changing product code or broad harness behavior. If failures need product fixes, identify the likely owner and hand off through the workboard.
